intro: Dev-call intelligence - the running capture of what our daily calls cover (in-product, carriers/vendors, data & servicing), the goals we're driving, the blockers in the way, and items that still need a task. Auto-summarized from the Gemini call recap.
note: Populated by CIH from the Gemini dev-call recap email after each call. (The site is static - the on-page button loads the last CIH-published notes; CIH regenerates this from the newest Gemini email.)
goals: Decouple account, policy, and participant statuses - make enrollment statuses a subset of policy statuses and lock a definitive policy-status list (adding 'Deceased').
Finish the master-settlor data load - pull missing settlor emails where the settlor is not the insured, and overwrite trust names/EINs with verified Provident data so DBR can reprocess.
Close the illustrated-surrender-value gaps - run Tranche 67+ now and clean up the nine Tranche-66 policies still missing data.
Ship the Payments Center incrementally - land the new payment UI (annual baselines, audit history, rejection workflow) and sync its fields into Tranche Management for reporting.
Clean up policy-data hygiene - isolate ILIA policies missing a policy number and retire non-enforced older-tranche policies by treating them as prospects.

blockers.title: DBR reprocessing waiting on the master-settlor data load
blockers.ask: Pull the missing master-settlor emails (settlor not the insured) and overwrite trust names/EINs from the Provident list, then reprocess (Mohit / Olivia; Jamin to grant doc access).

blockers.title: Illustrated surrender values - nine Tranche-66 policies still missing data
blockers.ask: 5 are missing policy numbers and 4 are missing a data row; proceed running Tranche 67+ while the Tranche-66 gaps are cleaned up (Mohit / Kyle).

blockers.title: Missing policy numbers in ILIA break master-list comparison and prospect-tab status
blockers.ask: Report all policies missing a policy number and cross-reference against enrollment status; comparison logic currently excludes null values (Shounak / Chris).

blockers.title: 'Low Point' folder not yet in the bank folder structure
blockers.ask: Dev to add a 'Low Point' folder to the bank Dropbox/Egnyte structure so documents file correctly once status hits 'sent to carrier' (Judy / Olivia).

needs_tasked.t: Lock a definitive policy-status list and add 'Deceased' as a status option
Report of all ILIA policies missing a policy number, cross-referenced to enrollment status
Add a 'Low Point' folder to the bank Dropbox/Egnyte folder structure

latest_call.title: Dev Meeting
latest_call.lede: Data-integrity + status-model call. Headlines: the team agreed to decouple account, policy, and participant statuses - enrollment statuses become a subset of policy statuses while account status is separated - and to lock a definitive policy-status list (adding 'Deceased'); master-settlor trust names and EINs will be overwritten with verified Provident data and missing settlor emails pulled so DBR can reprocess; illustrated surrender values are approved to run for Tranche 67+ while nine Tranche-66 gaps are cleaned up; and Kyle demoed the new Payments Center UI (annual baselines, rejection workflow, full audit history) that will sync into Tranche Management.

items.text: Status decoupling: account, policy, and participant statuses are too interconnected and cause logic issues - enrollment statuses will become a subset of policy statuses while account status is decoupled; Jamin to define the solution for team review.
Policy-status standardization: build a definitive list of policy statuses (e.g. Payment Received, Policy Issued, Policy Override) and add 'Deceased' as a new option.
Missing policy numbers: pull a report isolating every ILIA policy missing a policy number and cross-reference against enrollment status (current master-list comparison logic excludes null values).
Prospect/policy mismatch: policies are appearing in the Prospects tab despite having policy numbers - a participant-vs-policy status mismatch to resolve via the decoupling work.

Payments Center: Kyle demoed the new payment UI - annual payment baselines, expectation statuses, a rejection workflow with supporting-document requests, and an audit history showing who changed what (old/new values + raw JSON).
Settlor data: trust names and EINs will be overwritten with verified data from the Provident list where existing fields are missing or incorrect.
Carrier data verification: Judy to obtain reports from Eric on the data being sent to carriers, then compare and replicate internally to cut manual processing.
Low Point field mapping verified - the value is sourced from the illustration data for both Allianz and National Life and confirmed in place.

Master-settlor emails: pull the missing settlor emails for accounts where the settlor is not the insured (insured email may be reused where they are the same person); Jamin to grant Olivia access to the master-settlor document; DBR task updated to require emails.

Illustrated surrender values: Tranche 66 pulled with 9 of 94 missing data (5 missing policy numbers, 4 missing a data row) - proceed running Tranche 67+ now while the Tranche-66 gaps are cleaned up Monday.
Older-tranche cleanup: non-enforced policies in older tranches to be treated as prospects (or disabled if inactive over a year) so they don't linger in an incorrect state.

Bank Dropbox/Egnyte: add a missing 'Low Point' folder to the bank folder structure; Judy to share the folder list with Olivia; documents pull once status reaches 'sent to carrier' after the admin step on staging.

Payments + Tranche Management: map payment data fields into Tranche Management and add a link to the payments page in the deal view; release in stages (payment functionality first, then the Tranche Management field sync).
Enrollment statuses to become a subset of policy statuses; account status decoupled for logical separation.
Master-settlor emails sourced from existing file data where the settlor is not the insured.
Settlor trust names and EINs overwritten with verified Provident data.
Illustrated surrender-value update approved to proceed for Tranche 67 and all subsequent tranches.
Non-enforced policies in older tranches to be cleaned up by treating them as prospects.
A 'Low Point' folder to be added to the document folder structure.
Payment data fields to be mapped into Tranche Management, with a link to the payments page added to the interface.

themes.name: DBR / Master-Settlor Data Load
themes.latest: Master-settlor emails to be pulled where the settlor is not the insured, and trust names/EINs overwritten from the verified Provident list; DBR task updated to require emails so it can reprocess. Jamin to grant Olivia doc access.

themes.name: Status Decoupling & Policy Statuses
themes.latest: Account, policy, and participant statuses to be decoupled - enrollment statuses become a subset of policy statuses while account status is separated. Team to lock a definitive policy-status list and add 'Deceased'. Jamin defining the solution.

themes.name: Payments Center & Tranche Mgmt Integration
themes.latest: New payment UI demoed - annual baselines, expectation statuses, rejection workflow with supporting-doc requests, and full audit history. To be mapped into Tranche Management (with a link to the payments page) and released in stages.

themes.name: Illustrated Surrender Values (Tranche 66/67)
themes.latest: Tranche 66 pulled with 9 of 94 missing data (5 missing policy numbers, 4 missing a data row); approved to run Tranche 67+ now while the Tranche-66 gaps are cleaned up Monday.

themes.name: Missing Policy Numbers in ILIA
themes.latest: Report to isolate every ILIA policy missing a policy number, cross-referenced to enrollment status; comparison logic currently excludes null values, and some show wrongly in the Prospects tab. Domo filtering being worked out.

themes.name: Bank Dropbox / 'Low Point' Folder
themes.latest: A 'Low Point' folder to be added to the bank Dropbox/Egnyte structure (alongside EIN, ARC, Disclosure, Copy of Contribution); documents pull once status hits 'sent to carrier'. Judy to share the folder list with Olivia.

themes.name: Missing Statements & Scraper Data Gaps
themes.latest: ~933 policy-years with missing annual/confirmation statements; shifting to a batch request to National Life. Date-logic fix being tested for statements landing before the crediting date. No update this call.

themes.name: ePay Data Integrity
themes.latest: Transaction-number fix deployed for new servicing payments; recurring/monthly ePay payments still need transaction numbers - to be worked out with the ePay team. No update this call.

themes.name: DocuSign Signing Friction
themes.latest: Templates were forcing clients to fill financial fields that should transfer from ILIA; removing the 'required' status so clients can sign directly. No update this call.

themes.name: Allocation Forms (2nd Envelope)
themes.latest: Index-allocation acknowledgement form adopted for the second envelope (Allianz); data labels being mapped/cleaned on staging for National Life and Allianz. No update this call.

themes.name: Agent Data & Registration
themes.latest: Agent number to become a required field at registration; existing agent numbers to be back-filled by querying the DB on policy number. NPN-to-account linking flagged as a larger lift. No update this call.

themes.name: GWT - Agent-Driven Enrollment
themes.latest: Decision to simplify GWT to an agent-driven invitation flow; Jamin building diagrams/mockups. No update this call.

themes.name: Surrender Workflow
themes.latest: Improved logging + auto admin email notifications on status = surrendered. No update this call.

urgent.title: DBR reprocess blocked on master-settlor data load (emails + Provident trust/EIN overwrite)

Reprocess Tranche 66+ for missing illustrated surrender values - run 67+ now, clean up the 9 Tranche-66 gaps.
Replace participant status with policy status in Tranche Management / Prospects - support the enrollment-as-subset decoupling.

Add a 'Low Point' folder to the bank Dropbox/Egnyte structure; pull documents once status hits 'sent to carrier'.
